overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a dark, eerie forest camp at night. The character navigates past campfires, wooden fortifications, and an NPC soldier before crossing a wooden bridge and continuing through the woods toward distant lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fortification camp with scattered campfires

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the abandoned camp, approaching the wooden fortifications ahead

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden structure with slanted roof partially visible through the trees
multiple burning campfires casting orange light on the surrounding grass and dirt
tall wooden stake fence forming a defensive perimeter around the camp
worn dirt trail winding through the camp with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest camp at night, with the character walking along a dirt path toward wooden fortifications. Campfires burn to the left, illuminating the sparse vegetation and a dilapidated wooden hut, while a tall wooden palisade fence lines the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden palisade corridor with guard post

events.description: passing a soldier in red armor holding a torch near a campfire
passing through a gap in the wooden fence into denser forest area

agents.ego_description: walking past the guard post and through the gap in the wooden palisade fence

notable_agents.action: soldier in red armor standing by a campfire holding a lit torch, watching the path

entered.detail: break in the wooden palisade allowing passage through to the other side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a guard in red armor holding a torch, then moves through a gap in the wooden palisade fence. The lighting shifts as the character moves away from the campfires into a darker, more enclosed forest corridor with denser vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense birch forest with wooden bridge crossing

events.description: crossing a wooden plank bridge over a small stream or marshy area

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dense forest and carefully crossing the wooden plank bridge

entered.detail: white-barked birch trees with sparse leaves lining the forest path
narrow wooden bridge made of planks crossing a dark stream or marsh
military-style sandbag fortification wall visible in the distance ahead
small wooden boat left on the shore, partially visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, enclosed forest path surrounded by birch trees and dense undergrowth. The segment features crossing a wooden plank bridge, with a sandbag barricade and abandoned boat becoming visible in the distance as the character approaches the next camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: military camp with sandbag barricades and abandoned boat

events.description: passing the sandbag barricade and abandoned boat, entering deeper woods

agents.ego_description: walking past the sandbag fortifications and abandoned boat, continuing into the darker forest ahead

entered.detail: faint orange glow of fires visible deep in the forest ahead

segments.scene_description: The character passes close to a sandbag barricade and an abandoned rowboat on the right, then continues past these elements into a more open area before heading back into dense woods. Distant campfires glow on the horizon as the path continues deeper into the dark forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark forest camp that gradually transitions into a dense, secluded woodland path. It begins on a dirt trail flanked by burning campfires and a dilapidated wooden hut, moving steadily toward a tall palisade fence. As the character passes a torch-bearing guard in red armor and slips through a gap in the fortifications, the warm glow of the camp fades into a darker, more enclosed corridor of birch trees and thick undergrowth. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses a wooden plank bridge, revealing a sandbag barricade and an abandoned rowboat along the water's edge. Finally, the path opens briefly past these ruins before plunging back into the deep woods, where distant campfires glow faintly on the horizon.
